The '''Tusken's Eye''' was a [[Star/Legends#Types of stars|G-class]] [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Tusken's Eye system/Legends|Tusken's Eye system]], [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a cloudy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], and was where the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] resided following the destruction of [[Kr]]. It was here that fifteen [[nest ship]]s were built: one for Gorog and one for each of the fourteen nests that abandoned the [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] in [[36 ABY]].

==History==
With the help from [[Jae Juun]] and [[Tarfang]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] traced the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] from [[Woteba]] to the Eye aboard the ''[[DR919a]]''. There they infiltrated the Gorog nest ship as the nest ships jumped to the [[Murgo Choke]] to [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|engage]] an [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Alliance]] [[Blockade of the Utegetu Nebula|blockade]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}
